creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Matthias, patch is fine except that you forgot to remove PORTREVISION in all ports, where PORTVERSION had changed. Would you please update your patch?

The same applies to tryton 2.4 patch. If I understand correctly, you just concatenated the patches into one big patch. It is applies fine, but PORTREVISION should be removed too, so updated patch is needed.
